title: Essential Climate Variable
description: Physical, chemical, or biological variable or group of linked variables critical to characterizing Earth’s climate and providing empirical evidence for climate understanding, prediction, and servic...

definitions.definition: Physical, chemical, or biological variable or group of linked variables critical to characterizing Earth’s climate and providing empirical evidence for climate understanding, prediction, and service provision.
